Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 429

THET299 Independent Study (1-3 Credits)

An independent study in which each student completes an assigned major theatre project under close faculty supervision. Projects may culminate with term papers; scenic, lighting, or costume designs; or a stage production.

Restriction: Permission of instructor; and sophomore standing or higher. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
